description: Bounded Llama 3 Instruct compact-header chat-template shape coverage. These cases intentionally exercise Camelid's explicit compact renderer rather than arbitrary GGUF tokenizer.chat_template/Jinja execution.

prompts.note: Multi-turn user/assistant history followed by a new user turn.
Assistant-final messages should not append another assistant generation header.
Whitespace and multiline content are preserved inside message content.

messages.content: Preserve line breaks in reasoning inputs.
